accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurate context about the 1996 Act.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the date and provisions match the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill reauthorizes DoD sale of aircraft and parts for wildfire suppression.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly names the Wildfire Suppression Aircraft Transfer Act of 1996 and describes the amendments.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the use restriction that aircraft may only be used for wildfire suppression aircraft services.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the period runs from enactment (June 12, 2025) to October 1, 2035.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures reauthorization, water addition, use restriction, and cross-reference fix.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and descriptive with no editorializing.

concise.why: Compact with no padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the DoD and the 1996 Act being amended.

correct_figures.why: Dates of enactment and sunset are accurate.
